summary.overview: The meeting focused on proposal, client_review, pricing, meeting_schedule, demo, and budget.
key_decisions: We decided to schedule a client review next Tuesday.
The team agreed to delay the product demo until Thursday.
It was finalized that I will prepare the budget summary.
key_action_items: John: We should send the updated proposal by Friday.
Sarah: I will take ownership of that.
Sarah: I will send the revised deck tomorrow.
